CustomField.description: Set to true when the matched NEPA_Plaintiff_Profile__mdt record has Is_Tribal_Nation__c = true. Fires unconditionally regardless of risk tier — triggers the government-to-government consultation hard gate and NHPA Section 106 work order. Cannot be cleared without supervisor override. Satisfies the EJ/Tribal unconditional gate requirement.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Tribal Nation commenter detected. Triggers unconditional Section 106 / E.O. 13175 consultation gate.
CustomField.label: Tribal Plaintiff Flag
